message:
fix(core,vdbe): CASE NULL equality, CAST(NULL) preservation, and COLLATE eval

Three bugs fixed across all evaluation paths:

1. CASE NULL WHEN NULL incorrectly matched: Ne opcode with NULL operands
   returns should_jump=false, falling through to THEN clause. Fixed by
   adding IsNull checks before Ne in emit_case_expr (connection.rs) and
   emit_case (codegen.rs). eval_join_expr CASE also fixed with explicit
   NULL checks before cmp_values call.

2. CAST(NULL AS type) returned 0/0.0/"" instead of NULL: apply_cast and
   sql_cast both converted NULL through to_integer()/to_float()/to_text().
   Added early NULL return in both functions.

3. COLLATE clause in eval_join_expr fell through to catch-all returning
   NULL instead of evaluating the inner expression. Added Collate arm
   that delegates to inner expression evaluation.

9 regression tests covering CASE NULL base/when/join, CAST NULL as
integer/real/text/from-table, and COLLATE in join.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
